exact_reopen_condition: One direct SAGE journal correction, editor note, publisher notice, or equivalent publisher-originating public record becomes reachable.
better_next_distinct_route: Target a materially different SAGE publisher-facing or journal-facing notice surface rather than re-reading Crossref-level corrigendum linkage.
paper_thesis_use: Clarifies for manuscript/thesis methods prose that visible corrigendum metadata has already been harvested and that the unresolved delta is notice text, not more metadata repetition.
dashboard_hook: Blocked-notice backlog governor; Table 1E route-stop legend
caution: Do not infer correction wording or final editorial action from the existing Crossref relation plus mediated editor statement.

exact_reopen_condition: A direct NEJM notice page, public mirror, or equivalent publisher-originating notice text becomes visible beyond the already captured Crossref/OpenAlex/PubMed corroboration bundle.
better_next_distinct_route: Prefer a materially different publisher-originating route or a mirrored public notice; do not spend another cycle on unchanged registry metadata checks alone.
paper_thesis_use: Gives reviewer-safe route governance showing that NEJM is no longer evidence-thin, but still blocked at the notice-text layer.
caution: Do not restate editorial reasoning or synthetic-image details beyond directly observed metadata.

exact_reopen_condition: A Finnish official surface materially changes, or one new institution-specific document route below the generic search shell is identified.
better_next_distinct_route: Move from named-query replay to one institution-specific document route such as a police legal-function page, court process/guidance page, or justice-administration document tied to the phenomenon.
paper_thesis_use: Sharpens Table 1E limitations prose by showing the Finland blocker is now route-distinctive rather than generic official-search incompleteness.
dashboard_hook: Finland official-route replay governor; Panel A route-stop legend
caution: Bounded zero-result and empty-payload states are search-surface observations, not proof that no official Finnish record exists.

exact_reopen_condition: One named police, court, ministry, or justice-administration document explicitly links AI-assisted valitukset, fabricated case references, or institution-specific response burden to the Yle process family.
better_next_distinct_route: Preserve the current institution split for methods/dashboard use, but only reopen Finland when a phenomenon-specific institutional document candidate appears.
paper_thesis_use: Turns the Finland path into a reusable methods artifact explaining why actor-role proof, governance context, and off-target AI mentions remain below event corroboration.
caution: Do not upgrade actor-role verification, annual-report AI mentions, or governance speeches into event confirmation.

exact_reopen_condition: One non-Springer direct journal or publisher notice reaches the same class, changing the diversity ceiling rather than the notice-text existence question.
better_next_distinct_route: Use the current Springer pair as the stable benchmark and spend new effort on SAGE, NEJM, or one new publisher family.
paper_thesis_use: Protects paper/thesis phrasing from reopening already solved Springer notice capture while keeping the live blocker visible as publisher concentration.
caution: Do not narrate the two Springer-originating direct notices as cross-publisher prevalence or mature ecosystem practice.

exact_reopen_condition: A second document-grade court, tribunal, regulator, or institutional process-integrity family is captured elsewhere.
better_next_distinct_route: Preserve the Italian order as the Panel A benchmark and route effort toward diversification, especially Finland or another non-Italian family.
paper_thesis_use: Keeps the methods/results ceiling stable and prevents unnecessary relitigation of the one current document-grade anchor.
caution: Do not generalize from one regulator order to wider legal-system contamination or final illegality.

exact_reopen_condition: One residual lead gains a direct platform, publisher, indexer, or institutional action record that can escape the quarantine bucket.
better_next_distinct_route: Keep residual work secondary to Finland or non-Springer direct-notice upgrades unless a direct action record becomes newly visible.
paper_thesis_use: Supports limitations and backlog prose by making clear that residual cleanup is useful but not the next denominator-changing move.
caution: Do not collapse weak residual reporting into resolved misconduct or broad network findings.
